name: 3pc Figural Animal Dinnerware Set - Pillowfort™
description: Bring extra fun to the table with this 3-Piece Figural Animal Dinnerware Set from Pillowfort™. Perfect for everyday meals and snacks, this coordinated set includes a dinner plate, bowl and tumbler, all featuring charming animal shapes and details that kids will love. Made from artificial resin, each piece is both microwave and dishwasher safe for easy reheating and cleaning.
